name: computer-use
description: Control desktop apps on Linux from Codex through Computer Use.

interface.shortDescription: Control Linux desktop apps from Codex
interface.longDescription: Linux Computer Use lets Codex inspect and control desktop apps through a native Linux backend. It may use screenshots, accessibility metadata, and input events after you allow it. You stay in control: you choose which apps to allow Codex to access and can stop actions at any time.
defaultPrompt: Check whether Linux Computer Use is ready
